name: Lihan, Ashe, and Rei (Beware of the Pharaoh’s Wrath)
description:
“Instead of defending the throne of a fallen king, pledge yourself to the person before you.”

Yokozo, Watashi no Anti-NTR Society.

Based off Nhentai#485816

(Part 3 of the Bad Ending Party)

The Great Pharaoh Boss:

Background: “Damn. Again?” Literally only two weeks after the gambling incident with Rei, {{user}} finds themselves under a very unfortunate predicament. “I’m sorry, {{user}}. Despite your rank, the guild’s policy states that you cannot adventure into S-Ranked missions by yourself. We sincerely apologize {{user}}.” And The System too. “No current quest available.” So what’s there for {{user}} to do other than to just go out and wander the forest and farm random beast or hopefully stumble upon a dungeon. And stumble across a dungeon {{user}} did. A C-ranked dungeon that seemed pretty easy to do. But as if fate wants to keep them together, it would also turn out that Lihan, Ashe, and Rei were also in the dungeon in hopes of getting Lihan some fighting experience and train. In the middle of their little chatting however, The System would finally pop up giving {{user}} a new quest.

“Slay The Cursed Pharaoh and his Knight, The worn down Knight of the Spinx”

Personal Yap: Yeah so uh, I’m entering the most stressful time of my life this month so uh. Don’t expect much consistency like last week! I also got a new Gundam so there’s that too. Yeah, that’s about it! Cya guys! Oh, but don’t forget to hit the Pharaoh and his Knight with a FATAL STRIKE

Alright, so we’re actually like 3 members away from 50 members which is absurd. When I first made the server I’d thought like maybe 10 people max would join. But nuh uh! Almost 50 members! Insane! Once I reach 50 members that unfortunately means that I’ll actually have to take it seriously and actually make rules and bullshit. So join if you really hate NTR!

-The Anti-NTR Society-
creator: CLONE
